name: silu_and_mul_bf16
description: Fused SiLU-and-multiply (SwIGLU): silu(x) * y over the two halves of the last dimension, computed in FP32 then cast to BF16. Derived from AKA torch2flydsl/silu_and_mul_kernel Model.forward (the suite's FlyDSL target is irrelevant here; we lift the PyTorch oracle).
